assertion_results.text: Tracing configuration is generated for all 3 services (api-gateway, order-service, inventory-service) with service-specific names
assertion_results.evidence: Three config files: api-gateway/tracing.js (serviceName: 'api-gateway'), order-service/tracing.js (serviceName: 'order-service'), inventory-service/tracing.py (service_name='inventory-service').

assertion_results.text: W3C Trace Context headers (traceparent) are propagated between services on outgoing HTTP calls
assertion_results.evidence: All services explicitly configure W3CTraceContextPropagator (Node.js) / TraceContextTextMapPropagator (Python). Outgoing HTTP calls use instrumented clients.

assertion_results.text: A correlation ID middleware extracts trace ID from incoming requests or generates a new one if absent
assertion_results.evidence: Middleware extracts trace ID from traceparent header or X-Request-ID, generates new trace ID if neither present. Sets req.traceId / g.trace_id.

assertion_results.text: Correlation IDs are injected into log output so logs can be correlated with traces
assertion_results.evidence: Logger wrapper created that prepends [trace_id=<id>] to all log messages. Python uses logging filter to inject trace_id into log records.

assertion_results.text: Child spans are created for outgoing HTTP calls from api-gateway to order-service and from order-service to inventory-service
assertion_results.evidence: Auto-instrumentation via @opentelemetry/instrumentation-http (Node.js) and RequestsInstrumentor (Python) creates child spans for all outgoing HTTP calls.

assertion_results.text: Both Node.js (api-gateway, order-service) and Python (inventory-service) configurations are provided with language-appropriate OpenTelemetry SDKs
assertion_results.evidence: Node.js services use @opentelemetry/sdk-node. Python service uses opentelemetry-sdk with FlaskInstrumentor and RequestsInstrumentor.

assertion_results.text: Trace exporter is configured to send to a Jaeger-compatible OTLP endpoint (configurable via environment variable)
assertion_results.evidence: All services use process.env.OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT (Node.js) or os.environ.get('OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT') (Python) with default fallback to localhost:4318.
